parts.text: Hi, I have a wheat field at latitude 19.5 and longitude 75.3, field size is 2.5ha, planted on 2026-05-10.

To optimize your wheat crop, please apply 119,162.5 liters on June 27th and 8,837.5 liters on June 28th. Due to sufficient rainfall, no irrigation is needed from June 29th through July 3rd. Following this precise schedule saves you 922,000 liters of water, representing an 87.8% reduction compared to a standard daily watering routine.

Advisory: This recommendation supplements, does not replace, local agricultural extension advice.
